rationale.fidelity: Preserves advance supplier orders, exogenous demand, supplier capacity, robust in-set coverage, and the procurement-plus-worst-case-shortage objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Fully specifies the actor, commitment trigger, choices, stakes, uncertainty-budget mechanism, conservatism trade-off, and nominal or alternate-budget counterfactual.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Scholarly positioning is neither requested nor claimed and is treated as not applicable.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Labels calibration as an assumption, confines the guarantee to the selected set, and distinguishes model implications from unsupported universal protection.
rationale.prose_clarity: Comprehensive and precise, but the repeated DFC, gate, mapping, claims, and boundary sections are not economical.
rationale.overall: An excellent robust-planning brief with explicit resilience boundaries and no hard failure; only presentation economy is weaker.
